allow: Bash(node -e "var p=require\('path'\),f=require\('fs'\),h=require\('os'\).homedir\(\),d=p.join\(h,'.claude'\),q=p.join\('scripts','lib','utils.js'\);if\(!f.existsSync\(p.join\(d,q\)\)\){try{var b=p.join\(d,'plugins','cache','everything-claude-code'\);for\(var o of f.readdirSync\(b\)\)for\(var v of f.readdirSync\(p.join\(b,o\)\)\){var c=p.join\(b,o,v\);if\(f.existsSync\(p.join\(c,q\)\)\){d=c;break}}}catch\(x\){}}console.log\(d\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; data=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(t['path']\) for t in data.get\('tree',[]\) if t['type']=='blob']")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; data=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(t['name'], t['type']\) for t in data]")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; data=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(t['name']\) for t in data]")
